# CC Price Calculator

> A Claude Code Skill for calculating real-world costs of Claude AI subscriptions. It takes a subscription tier (Pro/Max 5×/Max 20×), number of people sharing the account (carpooling), and monthly price in CNY, then outputs per-person daily/weekly/monthly API quota in USD and the equivalent cost in CNY per USD of API usage. Supports cache hit rate adjustments and relay service pricing evaluation.

## Core Capabilities

- Calculate per-person quota splits for Claude subscription carpooling (拼车)
- Convert Credits-based limits to USD equivalents
- Factor in cache hit rates to show true effective value
- Evaluate relay (中转) service pricing against subscription baselines
- Rate deals on a 1-5 star scale based on cost-per-dollar benchmarks
- Auto-append calculation records to Obsidian vault

## Tech Stack

- Claude Code Skill (SKILL.md format)
- No external dependencies — pure prompt-driven calculation

## Data Model

```
Subscription Tiers:
  Pro ($20/mo):   550K Credits/5h,  5M Credits/week
  Max 5× ($100):  3.3M Credits/5h, 41.7M Credits/week
  Max 20× ($200): 11M Credits/5h,  83.3M Credits/week

Conversion: 1M Credits = $7.5
Cache: reads cost 0 Credits, default hit rate 82.9% → ×1.558 multiplier
```

## Usage

```
/CC价格计算 20× 三人拼 ¥600    → carpooling cost analysis
/CC价格计算 中转 0.45元/刀       → relay pricing evaluation
```

## File Structure

```
cyxj-cc-price/
├── SKILL.md       # Core skill with calculation logic and data tables
├── README.md      # Documentation
└── llms.txt       # AI discovery file
```
